Ntc And Motion To Set Aside Default (And Default Judgment)
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT QING HONG LI Motion to Set Aside Default. Appearances: Randall Choy, Esq. of Hedani Choy (415) 778-0800 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Gerard Lam, Esq. Attorney at Law, (510) 465-6685 appearing for Defendant and moving party. Ms. Li, defendant, is also present in court and sworn as a witness. Mr. Lam is acting as interpreter for Ms. Li. Both counsel are bilingual. A group of Exhibits, (records of proof of residency) are marked collectively as Exhibit 1, and introduced as evidence. Hearing held and argued. The Court also hears testimony from Ms. Li. Ruling: Motion to set aside default is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Exhibits are ordered returned to counsel for defendant in Open Court. (302/AJR) Judge: A. James Robertson; Court Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 8620

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
